title: Cobblemon EMI Compat
description: Cobblemon's recipes (campfire pot, brewing and berry mutation) native compatibility with EMI
body:
# Cobblemon EMI Compat

**Addon that displays and transfers all Cobblemon crafting recipes natively in EMI, including campfire pot, brewing stand, and berry mutation recipes. JEI/JEMI is not required (but supported).**

## Overview

**Cobblemon EMI Compat** bridges the gap between Cobblemon's complex recipe system and EMI's powerful recipe viewing interface. Browse, search, understand and craft all Cobblemon recipes directly through EMI's modern, user-friendly interface fully customized with tooltips and animations.

## Features

### Recipe Categories

*   **Berry Mutation** - Search for Uses on Farmland; Uses or Recipes on Berries;
*   **Campfire Pot** - Search for Uses on any Campfire Pot; Uses or Recipes on any ingredients or output. **Supports seasonings, with tooltips to help new players;**
*   **Brewing** - Search for Uses on the Brewing Stand; Uses or Recipes on any ingredients or output. **Customized UI for better visibility, showing outputs on a separate slot. Provides a separate (by default, configurable!) Cobblemon category for helping users find their next thematic brew!**

### EMI Integration

*   **Recipe Trees** - Break down complex crafting chains with EMI's built-in recipe tree feature, providing easy cost calculations;
*   **EMI Ingredient System** - See all possible items that can be used on each slot, powered by tags;
*   **EMI Recipe Handling** - Transfer all items for any recipe added by this mod;
*   **Fully animated and tool-tipped** - Helps you understand how Cobblemon's recipe types work.

### Next Steps

*   None so far! [Propose me some :)](https://github.com/rehv/cobblemon-emi-compat-issues/issues)

## Compatibility

*   ✅ JEI not needed for anything (JEI will work alongside and be hidden if both EMI and JEI are installed);
*   ✅ Multiplayer compatible (client-side only requirement);
*   ✅ Compatible with other EMI addons

## Contact and Support

Please use the Issues link provided.

## Supported Languages

**This mod includes machine translated custom text** for all languages supported by Cobblemon: Čeština (cs\_cz), Deutsch (de\_de), Ελληνικά (el\_cy), English (en\_gb, en\_us, en\_pt), Esperanto (eo\_eo), Español (es\_es, es\_mx), Français (fr\_ca, fr\_fr), Magyar (hu\_hu), Italiano (it\_it), 日本語 (ja\_jp), 한국어 (ko\_kr), Nederlands (nl\_nl), Polski (pl\_pl), Português (pt\_br, pt\_pt), Русский (ru\_ru), Svenska (sv\_se), ไทย (th\_th), Türkçe (tr\_tr), Українська (uk\_ua), Tiếng Việt (vi\_vn), 简体中文 (zh\_cn), 繁體中文 (zh\_hk, zh\_tw)

***
